title: Judith Rosenbaum-Andre to serve as next dean of the KU School of Journalism & Mass Communications
summary_en: The University of Kansas has selected Judith Rosenbaum-Andre, associate dean for faculty affairs and administration in the College of Liberal Arts and Sciences at the University of Maine, as the next dean of the William Allen White School of Journalism and Mass Communications. She will start her new position July 19.
title_cn: 罗斯鲍姆-安德烈将出任堪萨斯大学新闻与大众传播学院院长
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学已选定朱迪斯·罗斯鲍姆-安德烈（Judith Rosenbaum-Andre）担任威廉·艾伦·怀特新闻与大众传播学院（William Allen White School of Journalism & Mass Communications）下一任院长。罗斯鲍姆-安德烈现任缅因大学文理学院负责教师事务与行政管理的副院长，同时兼任传播与新闻系主任及媒体研究教授。堪萨斯大学首席学术官兼教务长阿拉什·马菲（Arash Mafi）表示，罗斯鲍姆-安德烈在促进教师与学生发展方面经验丰富，并在其职业生涯中始终致力于教学、学习与探索，相信她将继续推动学院的成功，并引导学院应对这一不断变化领域的挑战。

title: KU announces new 2026-2027 Self Memorial Scholars
summary_en: Twenty-one students have been selected to receive the University of Kansas Madison and Lila Self Memorial Scholarship for the 2026-2027 academic year. The award is given to outstanding seniors from KU who will be transitioning into their first year of a master’s or doctoral program at KU in the fall 2026 semester.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学公布2026-2027学年自我纪念奖学金获得者名单
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学于近日宣布，共有二十一名学生入选2026-2027学年麦迪逊与莉拉·自我纪念奖学金项目。该奖学金为基于学业成绩的奖项，面向即将于2026年秋季学期进入堪萨斯大学硕士或博士项目第一年学习的优秀本科四年级学生。获选学生在领导力与学术成就方面表现突出，且具备设定并实现需投入精力与毅力之目标的能力。

title: Douglas County cultural institutions partner for America at 250 project honoring public servants
summary_en: The Robert J. Dole Institute of Politics, Watkins Museum of History and city of Lawrence will honor current and former public servants living and working in Douglas County for a project that will debut at the city’s Summerfest Fourth of July event at the Douglas County Fairgrounds.
title_cn: 道格拉斯县文化机构联合启动美国250周年致敬公共服务人员项目
summary_cn: 值此美国建国250周年之际，堪萨斯大学罗伯特·J·多尔政治学院、沃特金斯历史博物馆与劳伦斯市公园、娱乐与文化局联合宣布一项全新合作项目，旨在表彰当前及历史上曾在道格拉斯县生活与工作的公共服务人员。该项目将于该县博览会场地举办的劳伦斯市国庆日夏季嘉年华活动中首次亮相。

title: Four students receive Kansas Biological Survey Student Research Awards for 2026
summary_en: The Kansas Biological Survey & Center for Ecological Research at KU has awarded $4,000 in funding this spring for student research to be conducted in the coming academic year. Four students will receive assistance through the research center’s 2026 Student Research Awards.
title_cn: 四名学生获堪萨斯大学生物调查2026年度学生研究奖
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学所属堪萨斯生物调查与生态研究中心于本春季拨付四千美元资助金，用于支持学生在即将到来的学年开展科研工作。根据该研究中心2026年度学生研究奖安排，共有四名学生获得此项资助。获奖学生研究课题涉及刺柏入侵后草原恢复及草原植物地下动态等领域。每位获奖学生须于2027年春季就其研究成果进行专题汇报。

title: Study of nonprofit resilience emphasizes importance of broad-based ties
summary_en: According to a new study from the University of Kansas, nonprofit organizations that seek to build resilience — or the capability to enact a rapid, robust response to challenges — should cultivate a broad network of relationships and view those ties as assets on par with financial and other important resources.
title_cn: 研究显示非营利组织韧性有赖广泛关系网络
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学一项最新研究表明，非营利组织若欲构建韧性——即对各类挑战做出快速且有力回应的能力——应着力培育广泛的关系网络，并将此类关系视为与财务及其他重要资源同等重要的资产。该项研究以新冠疫情封锁措施实施后的中西部某中等城市240个非营利组织组成的网络为对象，由该校传播研究学副教授卡梅伦·皮尔西与博士候选人莫莉·韩共同完成，相关成果发表于《管理传播季刊》。

title: KU students earn top honors at 2026 National Student Show and Conference
summary_en: University of Kansas students earned multiple top honors at the 2026 National Student Show and Conference in Dallas, with the program also named Best School by the national jury. KU students were recognized across portfolio, motion design, branding and conceptual categories, highlighting the strength and national impact of the program.
title_cn: KU students earn top honors at 2026 National Student Show and Conference

title: Information for news media covering University of Kansas Class of 2026 Commencement
summary_en: The University of Kansas invites news media to cover the university’s Commencement ceremony May 17 for the Class of 2026.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学发布2026届毕业典礼媒体采访信息
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学（University of Kansas）于当地时间5月17日上午10时30分举行2026届毕业生毕业典礼，邀请新闻媒体前往报道。典礼将从毕业生沿传统路线“下山”（walk down the Hill）前往大卫·布斯堪萨斯纪念体育场（David Booth Kansas Memorial Stadium）开始，随后举行典礼程序并由校长道格拉斯·A·吉罗德（Chancellor Douglas A. Girod）授予学位。新闻媒体摄影师须凭堪萨斯大学颁发的证件方可进入钟楼广场（Campanile plaza）的摄影区及体育场内拍摄，仅凭新闻机构证件不予认可。

title: Marketing expert develops framework providing retailers strategies for organizing around ecosystems
summary_en: In a new article, Murali Mantrala, the Ned Fleming Professor of Marketing at the University of Kansas, provides a practical framework for how retailers can deploy an ecosystem-centric strategy focusing on interdependent sets that jointly create and capture customer value.
title_cn: 市场营销专家构建零售商生态系统组织战略框架

title: KU illustration and animation students earn national honors from Society of Illustrators
summary_en: Two students from the University of Kansas School of Architecture & Design earned national honors in the Society of Illustrators Student Competition. Senior Bella LeJuerrne and Waverly Altis were selected from more than 4,500 entries, with their award‑winning work featured in a New York City museum exhibition May 2-16.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学插画与动画专业两名学生荣获美国插画师协会全国奖项
summary_cn: 2025年度美国插画师协会学生竞赛结果揭晓，该赛事系全美最具声望的学生插

title: KU International Affairs awards grants for research and collaboration abroad
summary_en: From listening to labor advocates in Nigeria to tracking the physics of river mixing in Chile, KU researchers are expanding understanding across borders. KUIA has awarded $75,000 to 35 faculty and students engaged in projects spanning 23 countries.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学国际事务部颁发资助支持海外研究与合作
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学国际事务部近日宣布，向该校31名教师及4名研究生颁发总额近7.5万美元的旅行资助，以支持其开展海外研究与学术合作。该资助经由竞争性评选程序确定，覆盖斯宾塞艺术博物馆、文理学院以及建筑与设计学院

title: Research aims to identify underlying causes for linked mental health issues
summary_en: A researcher from the University of Kansas has led a large-scale study of veterans to better understand how psychological conditions such as depression, anxiety, post-traumatic stress disorder and eating disorders are connected.
title_cn: 研究旨在揭示关联性心理健康问题的潜在成因
summary_cn: 美国堪萨斯大学一位研究员牵头开展了一项针对退伍军人的大规模研究，旨在深入了解抑郁症、焦虑症、创伤后应激障碍与进食障碍等心理状况之间的关联机制。该研究成果发表于《精神病理学与临床科学杂志》。研究团队依据精神病理学层级分类法，这一方法被视为对传统诊断与统计手册的替代性新兴方案，后者历来是临床诊断与治疗患者的标准指南。

title: KLETC graduates 20 new officers; longtime leader honored ahead of retirement
summary_en: Twenty students recently completed 14 weeks of training in preparation for careers in law enforcement. They are members of the 356th graduating class at the Kansas Law Enforcement Training Center.
title_cn: 堪萨斯执法培训中心第二十期学员毕业 资深负责人荣休获致敬
summary_cn: 堪萨斯执法培训中心于五月一日在哈钦森市诚信大厅举行毕业典礼，二十名学员完成十四周全日制培训课程，正式宣誓就职成为执法警官。作为堪萨斯大学下属机构，该中心自一九六八年起承担全州执法人员核心培训职责。典礼当日，学员亲友齐聚现场见证这一重要时刻，毕业生在仪式上庄严宣誓，标志着从受训学员向服务堪萨斯各地社区的在职警官的身份转变。

title: Faculty member pledges $1 million on One Day One KU to KU School of Medicine-Wichita
summary_en: Dr. Donna Sweet understands the importance of a University of Kansas School of Medicine education. Sweet, a School of Medicine-Wichita alumna and longtime faculty member, has pledged a $1 million estate gift in support of the Donna Sweet, M.D., Internal Medicine Program Fund.
title_cn: 教职员工向堪萨斯大学医学院威奇托分校捐赠一百万美元
summary_cn: 唐娜·斯威特医生（Dr. Donna Sweet）承诺向堪萨斯大学医学院威奇托分校捐赠一百万美元遗产赠礼，以支持以其姓名设立的“唐娜·斯威特医学博士内科医学项目基金”。斯威特医生系该校校友，并长期担任教职，已在医学院执教近四十五年。此项捐赠旨在确保该基金获得持续资助，该基金于二零一九年以两万五千美元初始赠礼设立，主要用于支持医学院内科医学系在艾滋病、传染病及初级保健教育领域的工作。

title: Two KU juniors to compete for Astronaut Scholarships
summary_en: Two outstanding University of Kansas undergraduates are representing KU in the Astronaut Scholarship program. Arthur Benson is a junior in chemical engineering from Lawrence, and Gabrielle Bolfing is a a junior in astronomy and geology from Eureka, Missouri.
title_cn: 两位堪萨斯大学大三学生角逐宇航员奖学金
summary_cn: 堪萨斯大学两名大三学生经选拔，代表该校参与宇航员奖学金项目。该奖学金由水星7号任务六名在世宇航员于1984年共同创立，旨在鼓励学生投身科学事业，确保美国在技术领域保持领先地位。来自水星、双子星、阿波罗、天空实验室及航天飞机项目的宇航员已加入此项基金会，迄今已向全国超过850名顶尖学者颁发总额达1000万美元的奖学金。

title: Study finds benefits in being older college student while working
summary_en: A study from the University of Kansas and Florida International University found that among post-traditional students, being older than 25, working, having dependents and other characteristics not normally found in college students predicted factors like cumulative grade-point average, continuing enrollment and graduating in six years. The research, which shows advantages in being an older student
title_cn: 研究表明年龄较大且在职大学生群体存在学业优势
summary_cn: 美国堪萨斯大学近日发布研究成果，针对东南部一所西班牙裔服务机构下属研究型大学工程专业学生群体，系统分析了后传统学生（即非传统学生）特征对学术表现的影响。研究涵盖包括兼职状态、年龄超过25岁、全职工作、拥有普通教育发展证书、需抚养家属及通勤等变量，并对累计平均绩点、下一学期注册率及六年毕业率等关键指标进行预测。数据显示，此类学生在该校工程与计算机项目中的比例超过90%，凸显研究其教育需求的紧迫性。
